description: To be effective, leaders must be able to adapt their organization and the people within it to address the challenges they face. Explore how leaders can enact, foster, and implement change in organizations and individuals. Topics will include managing organizational transformations, responding to crises, and performance improvement.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or declared in graduate Business Exchange program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or declared in graduate Business Exchange program
